zh.Ormesby, Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Englan: 英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret de Clere於大約1430年出生在英國諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾時，她的父親Robert Clere25歲，母親Elizabeth Uvedale13歲。她於1450年與Sir Ralph Shelton在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年1月7日在英國諾福爾可雪登享年71歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可雪登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret de Clere was born about 1430, in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, her father, Robert Clere, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Uvedale, was 13. She married Sir Ralph Shelton in 1450, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 7 January 1500, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Shelton, Norfolk, England.

fr.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret de Clere est née environ 1430, à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Clere, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Uvedale, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Shelton en 1450, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1500, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret de Clere um 1430 in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Clere 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Uvedale 13. Sie hat 1450 in England Sir Ralph Shelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1500 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Shelton, Norfolk, England und wurde in Shelton, Norfolk, England begraben.

ko.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 케이스터 세인트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret de Clere(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Clere(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Uvedale(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1450년 영국에서 Sir Ralph Shelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 1월 7일 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret de Clere nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Clere, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Uvedale, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Shelton em 1450, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. ru.Ormsby, Caistor Saint Edmunds, Norfolk,: цеистор сеинт эдмундс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret de Clere родилась около 1430 г. в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Clere было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Uvedale, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Shelton в 1450 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 7 января 1500 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Ralph Shelton en 1450, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1500, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
